title: Vitalvet: Veterinary health and retail group in the Garden Route
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you George and beyond...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you George and beyond - we are privileged to have won two awards in the Best of George Readers' Choice Awards 2025!


> Our York Street branch won Best Pet Store/ Products and our Knysna Road branch won Best Veterinarian.


These awards reinforce the fact that combining technology with compassionate care, a well-stocked retail department, 24/7 veterinary nursing care and having purpose-built facilities, makes the difference and sets the benchmark in veterinary health and retail in the Garden Route.

Vitalvet is committed to providing their clients and patients with trust in their medical capabilities as well as in customer satisfaction and providing a caring service.

With their recently launched HP3 Loyalty Club at Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre, it's a testimony that Vitalvet understands the interdependence of Happy Pets, Happy People and a Happy Planet.

"We are humbled and grateful for the trust our clients and community are placing in us," says Dr Awie de Villiers, founder and CEO of Vitalvet. "Our goal is - and always has been - to create a place where pet owners can find everything their animals need under one roof".

Vitalvet's wins in the Best of George Readers' Choice Awards are a testament to both their technical excellence and heartfelt commitment. Pet owners in the Garden Route have every reason to feel proud and confident in choosing them.

Pet owners can find everything their animals need under one roof.

24/7 veterinary nursing care.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
